name: [ACORE] Ads Daily Metrics — Meta + Google → Supabase

nodes.name: Meta Ads — Fetch Insights
nodes.notes:
CREDENCIAL PENDENTE: Criar credencial 'Meta Ads Access Token' tipo HTTP Query Auth (name=access_token). Precisa do token de longa duração da conta Meta Business.

Para múltiplas contas, substituir este nó por um SplitInBatches que itera sobre uma lista de account_ids (pode vir do Supabase adv_client_meta_accounts).

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: SELECT campaign.name, ad_group.name, ad_group_ad.ad.name, campaign.advertising_channel_type, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date = '{{ $('Set Date Range').item.json.date_range }}' AND campaign.status = 'ENABLED' AND ad_group.status = 'ENABLED' AND ad_group_ad.status = 'ENABLED'

nodes.name: Google Ads — Fetch Metrics
nodes.notes:
CREDENCIAL PENDENTE: Criar credencial Google Ads OAuth2 ou usar HTTP Header Auth com Bearer token. Precisa de: (1) Developer Token, (2) OAuth2 refresh token, (3) MCC Customer ID.

A query GAQL acima busca métricas por ad_group_ad (nível anúncio). Ajustar customer_id por conta.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  date: $json.date,
  client: $json.client,
  account_id: $json.account_id,
  account_name: $json.account_name,
  campaign_name: $json.campaign_name,
  adset_name: $json.adset_name,
  ad_name: $json.ad_name,
  objective: $json.objective,
  impressions: $json.impressions,
  reach: $json.reach,
  clicks: $json.clicks,
  spend: $json.spend,
  conversations: $json.conversations,
  leads: $json.leads
}) }}

nodes.name: Supabase Upsert
nodes.notes:
Upsert via PostgREST: header 'Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates' faz ON CONFLICT UPDATE na unique constraint uq_ads_daily_metrics (date, account_id, campaign_name, adset_name, ad_name).

A credencial 'Supabase REST — Service Role' já está configurada no n8n.
